title: SimplyVanilla Plus
description: A more feature-rich version of SimplyVanilla - adds content to compliment Vanilla gameplay
body:
![SimplyVanilla+ Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58e62fba5713210877df6c463b38473bff81304d.png)

  THIS MODPACK IS ON HOLD...Because
  - There are so many modpacks that achieve the same purpose as this, if not, does it better. For now, until I find an idea for this modpack, it will be on hold for the forseeable future

### Expanding the Vanilla Experience – Just a Little Bit

SimplyVanilla+ builds on the classic vanilla gameplay, adding a carefully selected mix of features that enrich the Minecraft experience without straying too far from its core. Whether you’re a vanilla purist or simply want a bit more depth, SimplyVanilla+ offers a familiar world with a few well-chosen enhancements.

### What’s Included:

- Performance Improvements
Optimized performance adjustments help the game run smoother on modern versions of Minecraft, especially with the extra enhancements. You’ll get the best experience without a heavy load on your system.

- Enhanced Visuals and Ambience
Updated graphics and ambient effects add a touch more immersion to your adventure. You’ll still feel like you’re in Minecraft, but with a bit more visual appeal and atmosphere.

- Balance and Simplicity
Each addition is chosen to keep the game balanced, preserving the vanilla feel. (SimplyVanilla+ won’t overwhelm you with excessive changes)

- Continual Updates and Tweaks
And of course, regular updates and experimentation to keep the modpack fresh


<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>
- Wilder Wild
- Farmer's Delight
- Tectonic
- Icendium
- Nullscape
- Amplified Nether
- Dungeons & taverns
- Armor Stand Arms
</details>
